_comment_purpose: Traefik dynamic config patch for Tailscale-routed OpenClaw on the cartorio tailnet (tail2fe279.ts.net).
_comment_install: Append 'http.routers', 'http.services' and 'tls.certificates' blocks to /etc/easypanel/traefik/config/main.yaml on the VPS. The file is auto-reloaded by Traefik's file provider. Tailscale cert files are mounted at /data/tailscale-vps-cartorio.{crt,key} (same path as the existing default-domain cert).
_comment_pre_reqs: 1. Tailscale HTTPS enabled in admin panel: https://login.tailscale.com/admin/dns (Enable HTTPS toggle).
2. tailscale cert vps-cartorio.tail2fe279.ts.net generated on VPS (writes to /root/ by default).
3. tailscaled running on VPS with HTTPSEnabled=true (tailscale status --json | jq .HTTPSEnabled).
4. Tailscale clients (Mac/iPhone) on the same tailnet auto-trust the cert (Tailscale root CA bundled in the OS).
5. The cartorio_openclaw-gateway service must be on the same Docker network as the easypanel-traefik (default overlay 'easypanel-cartorio' OR direct routing).
_comment_pre_reqs._comment_constraint: Tailscale HTTPS allows ONLY the node's own hostname (vps-cartorio.tail2fe279.ts.net). True wildcard *.tail2fe279.ts.net is NOT supported by Tailscale native certs. Workarounds: (a) re-name VPS to 'router' and use router.tail2fe279.ts.net with sni routing; (b) bring your own CA + ACME; (c) use path-based routing on the single allowed hostname (recommended for now).
